compiled_state.title: Implement ticket_edit in library and wire dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: ## Testing Mode RED ## What to Implement Add ticket_edit to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh and wire dispatcher edit case. ## Scope (ticket-edit.sh is 175 lines) ticket_edit [--title ] [--priority <p>] [--assignee <a>] [--ticket_type <t>]: - Parse args (flag-style like existing ticket-edit.sh) - If DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1: exec bash $SCRIPT_DIR/ticket-edit.sh "$@"; return $? - Pure bash: build EDIT event JSON for changed fields only; write via write_commit_event - Use return (not exit) for all error paths - Preserve validation logic (priority range check, ticket_type enum check) Dispatcher change: replace exec bash .../ticket-edit.sh with _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_edit "$@" ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] ticket_edit defined in ticket-lib-api.sh Verify: grep -q "^ticket_edit" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh - [ ] DSO_TICKET_LEGACY=1 routes to ticket-edit.sh Verify: grep -A5 "ticket_edit" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh | grep -q "DSO_TICKET_LEGACY" - [ ] test_ticket_edit_via_library passes Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-lib-api.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "PASS.*edit" - [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
